title: Daily Sacred Teachings
meta_description: A curated stream of daily sacred teachings inspired by the saints of Tiruvannamalai and the grace of Arunachala, for seekers on the inner journey.
body_html:
Sacred Teachings

May 9, 2026

The mind is like a river, always flowing outward. True peace is found when the river returns to its source

Past Archives

  • Apr 22, 2026

    In every moment, the opportunity for liberation exists; all that is required is to turn inward

  • Apr 12, 2026

    The mind is like a river, always flowing outward. True peace is found when the river returns to its source

  • Apr 11, 2026

    Silence is not the absence of sound, but the presence of truth, which needs no words to be understood

  • Apr 4, 2026

    True liberation comes not from escaping the world, but from seeing the world as a reflection of the Self
